title: Fix incorrect queue array operation due to array-bounds check

features.name: queue array declaration with dynamic queue dimension
features.description: Code should include a queue array declaration where an unpacked array holds dynamic queues with [$] dimension

features.name: queue push_back on array element accessed by index variable
features.description: Code should include a push_back operation on a queue array element where the queue is selected using an index variable

features.name: queue pop_front on array element accessed by loop variable
features.description: Code should include a pop_front operation on a queue array element within a foreach loop iterating over an unpacked array

features.name: foreach iteration over unpacked array with conditional queue access
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop that iterates over an unpacked array and conditionally accesses queue array elements inside the loop body
features.snippet:
foreach(out_v[k]) begin
  if (out_v_d1[k]) begin
    expect_data_head = expect_data[k].pop_front();
  end
end
